records.m_Talk_ENG: that these employees whom you'd been giving a lot of thought were absolutely necessary for the future ahead.

records.m_Talk_FRA: vous 95xtes arriv959 95p la conclusion que ces employ959s 959taient un 959l959ment vital pour votre entreprise et son futur.

records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with them, no matter the consequences.

records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch passiert.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called them to your office. They said they'd be here soon.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Also hast du sie in dein B9588ro gerufen. Sie sagten, sie wollen bald da sein.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you call us, Master?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you call us, Master?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you call us, Master?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Did you call us, Master?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Did you call us, Master?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Did you call us, Master?

records.m_Talk_ENG: We've heard today is an important day.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We've heard today is an important day.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We've heard today is an important day.

records.m_Talk_ENG: A lifetime contract, was it? The day we are formally bound to you, Master.
records.m_Talk_DEU: A lifetime contract, was it? The day we are formally bound to you, Master.
records.m_Talk_FRA: A lifetime contract, was it? The day we are formally bound to you, Master.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But it is strange.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But it is strange.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But it is strange.

records.m_Talk_ENG: We are the black rose, blooming in your shadow.
records.m_Talk_DEU: We are the black rose, blooming in your shadow.
records.m_Talk_FRA: We are the black rose, blooming in your shadow.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Even without such a contract, we have already pledged eternal loyalty to you...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Even without such a contract, we have already pledged eternal loyalty to you...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Even without such a contract, we have already pledged eternal loyalty to you...

records.m_Talk_ENG: What, then, is the purpose of such a redundant act?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What, then, is the purpose of such a redundant act?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What, then, is the purpose of such a redundant act?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Would you care to enlighten us, Master?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Would you care to enlighten us, Master?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Would you care to enlighten us, Master?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Right.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Right.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Right.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Understood.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Understood.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Understood.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, formality and procedure carry significant weight.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, formality and procedure carry significant weight.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, formality and procedure carry significant weight.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Simply signing a contract together allows one to feel a sense of unity... is that what you're saying?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Simply signing a contract together allows one to feel a sense of unity... is that what you're saying?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Simply signing a contract together allows one to feel a sense of unity... is that what you're saying?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Though we must admit, we don't quite understand what unity truly means.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Though we must admit, we don't quite understand what unity truly means.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Though we must admit, we don't quite understand what unity truly means.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But to be in the same place, doing the same thing as you, Master... it's not such a bad feeling.
records.m_Talk_DEU: But to be in the same place, doing the same thing as you, Master... it's not such a bad feeling.
records.m_Talk_FRA: But to be in the same place, doing the same thing as you, Master... it's not such a bad feeling.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So this is what a sense of unity feels like... this is what a lifetime contract means...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: So this is what a sense of unity feels like... this is what a lifetime contract means...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: So this is what a sense of unity feels like... this is what a lifetime contract means...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Have we understood correctly?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Have we understood correctly?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Have we understood correctly?

records.m_Talk_ENG: If we have...
records.m_Talk_DEU: If we have...
records.m_Talk_FRA: If we have...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Requesting praise, Master.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Requesting praise, Master.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Requesting praise, Master.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Requesting praise.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Requesting praise.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Requesting praise.
